content: CSS scroll-driven animations via animation-timeline only animate declared properties (transform/opacity) — they do NOT set will-change, transform, filter, perspective, or overflow on the element, and thus do NOT create a containing block for position:fixed descendants by themselves. The containing-block risk comes from transform/filter/will-change/contain applied via other CSS, not from animation-timeline. Applying the timeline to editorial sections (never an ancestor of the booking widget) is safe for vaul/sonner/react-day-picker position:fixed.
